commits.message:
fix(ci): use npm install instead of npm ci

The lock file drifts between local npm and CI npm versions when using
file: dependencies. npm install resolves from package.json directly.

fix(ci): capture tsc exit without triggering set -e

Use `cmd || tsc_exit=$?` pattern to prevent bash -e from aborting
on tsc's non-zero exit. Verify emission by checking dist/ output.

fix(ci): handle rich-js tsc diagnostics in build step

tsc emits output even with diagnostics when noEmitOnError is unset.
Verify emission by checking dist/index.js exists rather than trusting
the exit code.

refactor: Remove layout wrappers (non-goals) and fix CI

- Remove RichAlign, RichPadding, RichGroup, RichLayout — Ink owns
  layout via Yoga flexbox; wrapping these creates double-layout bugs
- Update SPEC.md with migration guide (§8) mapping Rich layout
  primitives to Ink's <Box> component
- Update README, demo site, and tests to match
- Fix CI: clone and build rich-js before npm ci (dist/ is gitignored
  in rich-js, so github: dependency doesn't work)

feat: Add README, tests, demo site, and gh-pages deployment

- README.md with full API documentation for all 20 components, 4 hooks,
  and re-exports
- 48 tests across 5 test files covering all tiers (static, animated,
  interactive, hooks, bridge layer)
- Static demo site generator (site/build.tsx) that renders components
  via Ink's renderToString, converts ANSI to styled HTML
- GitHub Actions workflow using gh-pages-multiplexer for versioned
  demo site deployment
- Mark all SPEC.md implementation tiers as complete

feat: Add SPEC.md and implement all component tiers

- SPEC.md: comprehensive specification for all rich-js-ink components
- Tier 2 static components: RichMarkup, RichRule, RichSyntax, RichMarkdown,
  RichJSON, RichPretty, RichColumns, RichTraceback
- Tier 3 wrappers/context: RichAlign, RichPadding, RichGroup, RichLayout,
  RichThemeProvider, useRichTheme, useRichRenderable
- Tier 4 animated: useSpinnerFrame, RichSpinner, RichProgressBar, RichStatus
- Tier 5 progress: useProgress, RichProgress
- Tier 6 interactive: RichPrompt, RichConfirm, RichSelect
- Updated index.ts with full exports including rich-js re-exports
- Updated demo.tsx to showcase new components

feat: Initial rich-js-ink project — Ink components for rich-js renderables

Bridge layer between rich-js (rendering primitives) and Ink (React terminal UI).
Includes core <Rich> component, plus <RichPanel>, <RichTable>, <RichTree> wrappers.
